get.summary: ListUsers returns users with optional filtering by status or search query.

patch.summary: UpdateUserRole changes a user's access level.

post.summary: ApproveUser activates a pending user account.
RejectUser deactivates a pending user account.
RevokeAllSessions revokes all sessions for a user and increments auth_version.

get.summary: ListJobs lists all job instances in the queue (pending, processing, failed).

delete.summary: DeleteJob removes a job instance from the queue.

post.summary: RetryJob resets a failed job's attempt count and sets it to run immediately.

get.summary: ListSchedules lists all recurring schedules currently defined in the system.

post.summary: PauseSchedule pauses a recurring schedule template.
ResumeSchedule resumes a paused recurring schedule template.
TriggerSchedule manually spawns a job instance from a schedule template immediately.

get.summary: GetSchedulerStatus retrieves the current scheduler engine configuration and status.
ListActiveSessions returns all non-expired, non-revoked sessions for the user.

post.summary: RevokeSession invalidates a specific user session by ID.
Logout revokes the presented refresh token.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: LogoutRequest contains the refresh token to revoke.

post.summary: RefreshSession issues new tokens using a valid refresh token.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: RefreshSessionRequest contains a valid refresh token.

post.summary: RevokeAllSessions invalidates all sessions for the user globally.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: RevokeAllSessionsRequest is an empty request for global session invalidation.

get.summary: GetCurrentUser retrieves the profile of the authenticated user.

post.summary: LoginUser authenticates a user and returns access and refresh tokens.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: LoginUserRequest contains user credentials for authentication.

post.summary: RegisterUser creates a new user account.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: RegisterUserRequest contains the fields for creating a new user account.

get.summary: ListSpaces lists all spaces the authenticated user has access to.

post.summary: CreateSpace creates a new workspace.

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: CreateSpaceRequest contains the fields for creating a new workspace.

get.summary: GetSpace retrieves a workspace by ID.
ListBudgets lists all budget templates in a workspace.

post.summary: CreateBudget creates a new budget template in a workspace.

get.summary: GetBudgetPeriod retrieves or generates the budget period for a specific date.

parameters.name: date
parameters.description: Timestamp for calculation, defaults to current time if omitted

post.summary: CreateExpense logs a new expense transaction.

get.summary: GetInsights aggregates workspace spent insights and statistics.
ListExchangeRates lists all exchange rate rules in a workspace.

delete.summary: DeleteExchangeRate deletes a specific daily rate conversion rule.

post.summary: CreateExchangeRate registers a new daily rate conversion rule.

get.summary: ListRecurringExpenses lists recurring expenses for a workspace.

post.summary: CreateRecurringExpense configures a new recurring expense rule.

delete.summary: DeleteRecurringExpense deletes a recurring expense rule.

put.summary: UpdateRecurringExpense modifies an existing recurring expense rule.

get.summary: ListScheduledPayments lists scheduled payments for a workspace.

post.summary: ConfirmScheduledPayment clears a scheduled payment by promoting it to a permanent transaction.

get.summary: GetFinanceSettings retrieves the finance settings for a workspace.

post.summary: ConfigureFinance sets up the default base currency for a workspace.

get.summary: ListTransactions lists paginated transactions for a workspace.

delete.summary: DeleteTransaction deletes any type of transaction.

get.summary: ListSpaceMembers lists all members of a workspace.

post.summary: AddSpaceMember adds a member to a workspace.

delete.summary: RemoveSpaceMember removes a member from a workspace.

patch.summary: UpdateSpaceMemberRole updates a member's role in a workspace.

FinanceConfigureFinanceBody.description: ConfigureFinanceRequest contains fields for initial setup.

FinanceCreateBudgetBody.description: CreateBudgetRequest contains fields to create budget.

IdentityRevokeSessionBody.description: RevokeSessionRequest targets a specific session to invalidate.

identifier.description: Username or email of the user.

userId.description: The user ID to add as a member.

SpacesAddSpaceMemberBody.description: AddSpaceMemberRequest contains the fields for adding a member.

SpacesUpdateSpaceBody.description: UpdateSpaceRequest contains the fields for updating a workspace.

SpacesUpdateSpaceMemberRoleBody.description: UpdateSpaceMemberRoleRequest contains the fields for updating a member's role.

identityAdminV1User.description: Shared user message — mirrors the v1.User but scoped to admin context.

saturnIdentityV1RevokeAllSessionsRequest.description: RevokeAllSessionsRequest is an empty request for global session invalidation.

status.description: The current status of the user account.

saturnIdentityV1User.description: User represents a registered user in the system.

v1Budget.description: Budget represents a budget template definition.

v1BudgetPeriod.description: BudgetPeriod represents an active instantiation of a budget.

v1CreateSpaceRequest.description: CreateSpaceRequest contains the fields for creating a new workspace.

v1ExchangeRate.description: ExchangeRate represents a daily rate record.

v1ListSpaceMembersResponse.description: ListSpaceMembersResponse contains the list of members and pagination token.

v1ListSpacesResponse.description: ListSpacesResponse contains the list of spaces and pagination token.

v1LoginUserRequest.description: LoginUserRequest contains user credentials for authentication.

accessToken.description: The access token for authenticated requests.

accessTokenExpiresAt.description: Expiration time of the access token (Unix seconds).

refreshTokenExpiresAt.description: Expiration time of the refresh token (Unix seconds).

v1LoginUserResponse.description: LoginUserResponse contains the authentication result with both tokens.

v1LogoutRequest.description: LogoutRequest contains the refresh token to revoke.

v1RefreshSessionRequest.description: RefreshSessionRequest contains a valid refresh token.

v1RegisterUserRequest.description: RegisterUserRequest contains the fields for creating a new user account.

role.description: The member's role within the workspace.

v1SpaceMember.description: SpaceMember represents a member of a workspace.

userAgent.description: User Agent string associated with the session.

ipAddress.description: IP address of the client that created the session.

lastUsedAt.description: When the session was last utilized.

v1UserSession.description: UserSession represents an active user session.
